channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Colleges boost rural applications but struggle to get students to enroll
item.description: Selective colleges are slowly increasing rural enrollment with funding from a rural alumnus, but attendance remains a challenge.

item.title: Republican who voted to convict Trump faces reelection test
item.description: Louisiana Senator Bill Cassidy, one of seven Republicans who voted to impeach Trump, now runs for reelection in a competitive race.

item.title: Eurovision Song Contest grand final features pop music and protests
item.description: The Eurovision final takes place Saturday amid tight security and rain, but fan enthusiasm and opposition remain strong.

item.title: Residents of Vilseck, Germany, fear Trump may withdraw 5,000 U.S. troops
item.description: A threat by President Trump to remove troops unsettles a Bavarian town that depends on U.S. military personnel and their families.
